sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20503" key="boubwnofu/lac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βουβωνο-φύλαξ</orth>[<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ακος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n20503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">truss for hernia</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.57</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
